name: Git-AI Browser Worker
postCreateCommand: python -m pip install -q requests cryptography playwright && python -m playwright install --with-deps chromium && touch .worker_deps_ready
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'mkdir -p /tmp/git-ai && (WORKER_NONINTERACTIVE=1 setsid bash scripts/start_codespace_worker.sh </dev/null >>/tmp/git-ai/worker.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/git-ai/worker.pid); sleep 1'
postAttachCommand: bash -lc 'if ! pgrep -af codespace_worker.py >/dev/null; then (WORKER_NONINTERACTIVE=1 setsid bash scripts/start_codespace_worker.sh </dev/null >>/tmp/git-ai/worker.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/git-ai/worker.pid); fi'
